response:
```sql
SELECT airport_code
FROM (
    SELECT origin_airport_code AS airport_code, COUNT(*) AS flight_count
    FROM flights
    GROUP BY origin_airport_code
    UNION ALL
    SELECT destination_airport_code AS airport_code, COUNT(*) AS flight_count
    FROM flights
    GROUP BY destination_airport_code
) AS combined_flights
GROUP BY airport_code
ORDER BY SUM(flight_count) ASC
LIMIT 1;
```
